nodes.name: Congo moor chat
nodes.summary: The Congo moor chat or Congo moor-chat (Myrmecocichla tholloni) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. Range It is found in Angola, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, and Gabon. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland and subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland. References

nodes.name: Myrmecocichla
nodes.summary: Myrmecocichla（Myrmecocichla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Sooty chat、Anteater chat、Ant-eating chat等7种鸟类。
